name: Univance Corporation
summary: Univance Corporation manufactures and sells drivetrain transmission products for automotive, agricultural, industrial, and off highway applications in Japan and internationally. The company offers gear boxes for truck motors and generators; transfer cases and transmissions for longitudinal engine layouts; part time transfer cases for SUV and pick-up applications; PTUs for transversely engine layouts; transmissions and reduction units for agricultural machinery vehicles; and reduction gearboxes for construction vehicles. It also provides functional, CVT, AT, transmission, differential, steering, and engine components for automotive sector, as well as clutches for automatic transmissions. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Kosai, Japan.
